creator: kallie.klocko.1978@gmail.com
text:
Cydia Impactor is a popular tool for jailbreaking iOS devices. Jailbreaking is the process of removing the software restrictions that Apple places on iOS devices. This allows users to install jailbreak apps, which are apps that are not available in the App Store. Jailbreaking also allows users to customize their iOS devices in ways that would not otherwise be possible.

More information - https://cydiaimpactor.web.app/
